name_en: Original: This is the most exquisite and well-shaped crossbody bag from Brand B. Made from selected full-grain leather spliced with House tartan pieces, the shape is exquisite and structured. The bag features an open interior compartment and an external zip pocket for easy storage. Dimensions: 24 x 4 x 17.5cm ❤️❤️ Model: 8251
